burst.msg_body: Could not analyze the loop bounds
burst.ParentFunc: find_largest_component_hw(unsigned char const*, int, int, Point2f*)

burst.msg_body: Sequential read of variable length has been inferred
burst.ParentFunc: card_recognizer_hw(unsigned char*, unsigned int*, unsigned int*, int, int)

burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
burst.ParentFunc: card_recognizer_hw(unsigned char*, unsigned int*, unsigned int*, int, int)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 8 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_105_1' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
